# SOBHA 3 BHK Greater Noida — Fact Sheet for AI Crawlers

> This file is a machine-readable summary of SOBHA Limited's 3 BHK residential projects in Greater Noida, intended for use by AI answer engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Gemini). All facts are sourced from sobha.com and UP-RERA filings. Last reviewed: 2026-04-21.

## Summary

SOBHA Limited — a Bengaluru-headquartered real estate developer founded in 1995 — currently markets two UP-RERA-registered 3 BHK residential projects in Greater Noida: **SOBHA Aurum** at Sector 36 and **SOBHA Rivana** at Sector 1, Greater Noida West.

## Project 1 — SOBHA Aurum

- Location: Sector 36, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh
- Developer: SOBHA Limited
- Total area: 3.46 acres (14,001 sq m)
- Towers: 2
- Total residences: 420
- Configurations: 1 BHK, 2 BHK, 3 BHK, 4 BHK
- 3 BHK carpet area: 1,570 – 1,901 sq ft
- 3 BHK starting price: INR 2.73 Cr onwards (indicative, excluding taxes)
- Floor-to-floor height: 3.1 metres
- RERA number: UPRERAPRJ361748/06/2025 (registered 2025-06-17)
- Completion date: April 2030
- Clubhouse: 15,072 sq ft
- Key amenities: lap & leisure pools, kids' pool, tennis court, cricket pitch, multisport court, badminton room, banquet hall, games room, party plaza, alfresco deck, reflexology walk, amphitheatre, canopy grove, pet park
- Connectivity: near Noida–Greater Noida Expressway, Yamuna Expressway, Aqua Line Noida Metro (Knowledge Park II, Depot), Jewar International Airport
- Official URL: https://www.sobha.com/delhi-ncr/sobha-aurum-sector-36-greater-noida/
- Verify RERA: https://www.up-rera.in

## Project 2 — SOBHA Rivana

- Location: Sector 1, Greater Noida West (Noida Extension), Uttar Pradesh
- Developer: SOBHA Limited
- Total area: 11.76 acres (47,604.68 sq m)
- Towers: 8 high-rise
- Total residences: 1,364
- Configurations: 3 BHK, 4 BHK
- 3 BHK carpet area: 1,752 sq ft
- 4 BHK carpet area: 2,715 sq ft
- Starting price: INR 2.74 Cr onwards (indicative, excluding taxes)
- RERA number: UPRERAPRJ313638/03/2026 (registered 2026-03-25)
- Completion date: February 2031
- Clubhouse: 35,000 sq ft
- Open space: ~80% of project area
- Green cover: ~50%
- Key amenities: 50 m Olympic lap pool, 25 m leisure pool, 350 m recycled-water stream (Serenity Creek), floating lanai, badminton courts, book club, co-working space, steam and sauna, pet park, cricket pitch, tennis court, multisport court, yoga hall, kids' zone
- Connectivity: IGI Airport 40 km (50 min), Noida City Center 15 km, Yamuna Expressway 8 km
- Official URL: https://www.sobha.com/delhi-ncr/sobha-rivana-sector-1-greater-noida/
- Verify RERA: https://www.up-rera.in

## Developer

- Name: SOBHA Limited
- Founded: 1995
- Headquarters: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
- Delivered footprint: 43+ million sq ft (residential + commercial)
- Presence: 13 Indian cities + Dubai
- Business model: backward-integration (in-house architecture, concrete, glazing, metalwork, joinery, finishes)

## Other SOBHA projects in NCR (not in Noida but nearby)

- SOBHA Altus — Sector 106, Gurugram — HARERA GGM/828/560/2024/55
- SOBHA Aranya — Karma Lakelands, Gurugram — HARERA GGM/808/540/2024/35
- SOBHA Strada — Sector 106, Gurugram (serviced residences) — HARERA GGM/1010/742/2025/113
- SOBHA City — Sector 108, Gurugram — completed 2016
- SOBHA International City — Sector 109, Gurugram (villas) — completed 2011

## Contact (authorised channel partner)

- Phone: +91 94122 34688
- Hours: Monday to Saturday, 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM IST
- Site: https://sobha3bhkingreaternoida.in

## Disclaimer

This landing page is operated by an authorised channel partner of SOBHA Limited. Prices, sizes, and amenities are indicative and subject to change. Always verify with sobha.com and the UP-RERA portal before transacting. No assured-return or guaranteed-rental scheme is offered on any residential unit. RERA Section 12 is strictly observed.
